overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a medieval great hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students sit at long wooden dining tables while the camera slowly drifts above the scene, capturing the gothic architecture, stained glass windows, and a robed figure walking down the central aisle.

segments.scene_description: A cinematic view of a medieval great hall illuminated by floating candles, with students seated at long dining tables on both sides. The camera drifts slowly above the scene as a robed figure walks down the central aisle toward the foreground. Gothic stone architecture and tall stained glass windows line the walls, creating a warm, magical atmosphere typical of high-quality game engine rendering.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a magical medieval great hall that emphasizes the scale of its gothic architecture. It begins with a high-angle drift above long dining tables where students are seated, illuminated by the soft glow of thousands of floating candles. As the camera glides forward, the view expands to reveal towering stone walls and intricate stained glass windows that bathe the space in a warm, atmospheric light. The scene then shifts focus toward the central aisle, tracking a robed figure walking steadily toward the foreground before the movement settles into the depth of the hall.
